prose:
Frontier-orbital energies for furan computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Calculation was a single-point on the user-supplied geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, exact four-center integrals (no density fitting). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Results:
- HOMO (index 17): −6.3597638 eV
- LUMO (index 18): −0.1024036 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 6.2573602 eV

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3597638 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024036 eV, electronegativity = 3.2310837 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1286801 eV, chemical softness = 0.3196236 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.6684195 eV.

These are Koopmans-theorem orbital eigenvalues, not excitation energies. Method: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
